query:
-- 验证批次价格更新结果（查看前5条）
SELECT id, variantCode, sellingPriceFOB, sellingPriceRMB 
FROM product_variants 
LIMIT 5;

-- 验证外箱数据更新结果（查看前5条）
SELECT id, cbm, grossWeight, netWeight 
FROM package_boxes 
LIMIT 5;

-- 统计更新后的数据
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_variants,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sellingPriceFOB IS NULL OR sellingPriceFOB = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_fob,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sellingPriceRMB IS NULL OR sellingPriceRMB = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_rmb
FROM product_variants;

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_boxes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cbm IS NULL OR cbm = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_cbm,
  SUM(CASE WHEN grossWeight IS NULL OR grossWeight = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_gross_weight,
  SUM(CASE WHEN netWeight IS NULL OR netWeight = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_net_weight
FROM package_boxes;
